---
title: "Skills"
---

# Skills & Certifications

This page summarizes the main areas of knowledge that support my profile as an MBA candidate with experience in cybersecurity, governance, risk, privacy, and compliance-related work.

## Governance, Risk & Compliance

- Cybersecurity governance support
- Risk identification and documentation
- Audit support
- Control review
- Compliance-oriented reporting

## Privacy & Data Protection

- LGPD awareness and project support
- GDPR familiarity
- Privacy governance concepts
- Documentation and control mapping

## Third-Party Risk & Assurance

- Vendor risk review
- Evidence collection and organization
- Issue tracking
- Structured assessment support

## Business & Strategy

- Problem structuring
- Stakeholder communication
- Executive-style summaries
- Business analysis using strategy frameworks

## Analytics & Digital Tools

- Excel
- PowerPoint
- Quarto / Markdown
- Basic Python / pandas
- GitHub

## Frameworks and Standards

- ISO/IEC 27001
- NIST
- CIS
- LGPD
- GDPR
- TPRM

## Certifications

- EXIN Information Security Foundation
- SENAI - Certified Electrician
- SENAI - Building Automation and Electronic Security Systems
- SENAI - Electrical Control Systems
